summary: Release Record RR-TASKFLOW-001 passes all 6 hard gates — outcome declared from enumerated list as successful-full-exposure, all 5 RP deployment steps have concrete evidence with timestamps and retrievable locations, all 3 exposure stages logged with observed metric values and named decision maker, metrics reported with specific values and timestamps throughout watch period, final disposition consistent with release summary, and Layer 6 handoff section complete with monitoring active, SLO baseline referenced, open incidents assessed, and recommended watch items listed.

warnings.description: The watch period at Stage 3 extended well beyond the 4-hour minimum (from 2024-03-18 20:00 UTC to 2024-03-21 09:00 UTC — approximately 61 hours). This is noted in the watch period summary and is not a defect, but the RR does not explain why the watch period was extended rather than closed after the minimum 4 hours. A brief explanation would improve auditability.

notification.delivery_rate baseline is captured from the Stage 1 measurement (99.1%) and referenced as the SLO baseline. The RR §7 watch item appropriately flags this for 30-day review. Layer 6 should formally validate this as an SLO before the 30-day window closes.
warnings.location: §7 Handoff to Layer 6 — SLO Baseline / notification.delivery_rate
